Expert Tax Preparation & Strategic Tax Planning for Long-Term Wealth
Your Trusted Partner in Maximizing Tax Savings & Securing Financial Growth in Orange County and Greater Los Angeles
 At KDA Inc., we combine meticulous tax preparation with proactive tax strategies. Serving individuals, entrepreneurs, investors, and businesses across Orange County and the Greater Los Angeles area, our seasoned tax strategists ensure accurate filings, maximize your deductions, maintain IRS compliance, and help you achieve long-term financial success.
Expert Tax Consulting, Preparation & Advisory Services Since 1993
For over three decades, Karla Dennis and Associates, Inc. (KDA Inc.) has been helping individuals and businesses across Orange County, Los Angeles, and nationwide minimize taxes and maximize financial growth. Founded on integrity and expertise, our firm has grown from a family-run business into one of California’s most trusted tax consulting firms, serving thousands of clients every year.
At KDA Inc., we do more than prepare taxes — we create strategic tax plans designed to help clients build long-term wealth. Our team of licensed tax consultants, CPAs, and Enrolled Agents specializes in tax preparation, proactive tax strategy, and business advisory services that go far beyond traditional accounting.
We pride ourselves on delivering measurable results — helping clients reduce tax liability, stay compliant with federal and state laws, and implement wealth-building strategies tailored to their goals.
BOOK A CONSULTATION
With over 100  five-star reviews across Google and Yelp, our commitment to excellence has earned us recognition among the top tax firms in California. Whether you’re an entrepreneur, real estate investor, or family looking for peace of mind, KDA’s mission remains the same: to help you keep more of what you earn.
If you’re searching for the best tax consultant in Los Angeles or Orange County, we invite you to experience the KDA difference.
FEATURED IN
Karla Dennis and Associates Inc. has rebranded as KDA Inc. Learn about what this means as we make bold transitions in 2023 and beyond.
READ MORE

Structure your business effectively to lower your taxes.
Quarterly Advisory Meetings
Ongoing guidance designed to proactively reduce your annual tax obligations.
Advanced Tax Planning
Long-Term Tax Reduction: Comprehensive planning for sustained tax efficiency.
Wealth-Building Strategies: Tax-efficient financial growth strategies for real estate investors.
Retirement & Legacy Planning: Protect your wealth through strategic retirement and estate tax planning.
Why Clients Choose KDA
20+ Years of Expertise: Deep experience with California and federal tax law.
Professional Team: Enrolled Agents, CPAs, and dedicated tax strategists committed to your financial success.
Proven Results: Clients regularly achieve measurable tax savings—averaging thousands annually.
Personalized Attention: Each client receives proactive, customized strategies tailored to their specific financial situation.
INDUSTRY SPECIALIZATIONS
We partner with businesses who mean business
Wherever your passion lies, know that we carry the same determination and heart to protect your hard-earned money.

ABOUT KDA
Empowering the nation through tax savings is our family’s mission
For over 30 years, across all 50 states, we’ve supported businesses and individuals by staying up-to-date and informed about their tax obligations. We know you work hard for your money and that should mean you keep as much of it as you can.
Partnering with KDA means joining a tax family that’ll have your back, regardless of your financial situation. So whether you’re looking for next-level guidance for your small business, large medical practice or anything in between, you’ll be in good hands.
MEET THE TEAM
The KDA Promise
We get to know your unique obstacles, then find tax strategies tailored to your goals.
We work with you extensively to define your financial future so you can thrive long-term.
We will keep your best interests in mind and have your back every step of the way.
